theses.statement: AI datacenter power constraints bind through at least 2029 regardless of capital committed.
theses.kill_condition: Turbine/transformer lead times halve OR interconnection median < 2yr OR datacenter demand growth < 10%/yr.
theses.plain: Power, not chips, is what actually delays AI buildouts through 2029 — turbines and grid connections take years to arrive and no amount of capital speeds that up.

kill_watch.signal: Grid interconnection median queue time (US, constraint.grid-interconnection-us)
kill_watch.current_value: ~5 yrs median (LBNL Queued Up, last annual read)

theses.edge_basis: Most still read this as a turbine story; the binding constraint is interconnection queue (5yr median), which is non-obvious and infrastructure-political, not technical.

margin.buffer_note: Holds even if transformer lead times improve 30% — interconnection queue still binds independently.
margin.breaks_at: Turbine/transformer lead times halve AND interconnection reform passes simultaneously

theses.body: AI datacenter power constraints bind through at least 2029 regardless of capital committed.

theses.statement: Every chokepoint rent decays over 5–15 years as bypass investments arrive; date-stamp all concentration bets.
theses.kill_condition: A major chokepoint bypass is abandoned despite strong economic incentive (no case in 50yr record).
theses.plain: No monopoly or chokepoint lasts — someone always builds a workaround within 5-15 years once the payoff is big enough, so treat every concentration bet as having an expiration date.

kill_watch.signal: Count of major chokepoint bypasses abandoned mid-construction despite strong economic incentive
kill_watch.current_value: 0 observed across the 50yr record this tool tracks

theses.edge_basis: The decay mechanism (bypass investment under economic pressure) is systematically underweighted; analysts model rents as static, not on a decay clock.

margin.buffer_note: Mechanism has zero historical counterexamples over 50yr record. Even geographic chokepoints get pipeline bypasses.
margin.breaks_at: First bypass abandoned despite compelling economic incentive

theses.body: Every chokepoint rent decays over 5–15 years as bypass investments arrive; date-stamp all concentration bets.

theses.statement: 2044 workforce is already born; demographic forecasts (labor supply, consumption, debt capacity) have ~zero uncertainty at 20yr horizon.
theses.kill_condition: A country achieves a 50%+ fertility reversal within 10yr (no precedent).
theses.plain: We already know who's going to be of working age in 2044, because every one of them is already born — this isn't a projection, it's a headcount.

kill_watch.signal: Largest 10yr fertility-rate reversal, any tracked country
kill_watch.current_value: unknown — not verified against UN WPP 2024 in this dataset; no modern precedent above ~15-20% is known to the author

theses.edge_basis: The fact is known; the actionability is still underpriced. Most don't date-stamp the 2044 labor supply implications or anchor them to specific sector demand curves.

margin.buffer_note: 2044 workforce is literally already born. Fertility only moves the tail. Zero-uncertainty claim holds for anyone under 18 today.
margin.breaks_at: 50%+ fertility reversal in 10yr (no modern precedent) OR major migration shock

theses.body: 2044 workforce is already born; demographic forecasts (labor supply, consumption, debt capacity) have ~zero uncertainty at 20yr horizon.

theses.statement: Sovereign AI compute buildouts (Gulf, EU, Southeast Asia) represent price-insensitive demand that floors GPU/fab utilization regardless of US hyperscaler capex cycle.
theses.kill_condition: Sovereign AI programs cut budgets >50% or no sovereign model reaches commercial deployment by 2028.
theses.plain: Governments buying AI compute don't shop on price the way companies do, so their spending keeps chip demand high even if US tech firms pull back.

kill_watch.signal: Sovereign AI program budget commitments (UAE/Saudi/EU) vs. prior-year commitments
kill_watch.current_value: unverified — no confirmed >50% cut across 3+ programs as of this vintage; budget data not independently checked
kill_watch.trigger_value: >50% cut across 3+ major programs, or no commercial deployment milestone by 2028

theses.edge_basis: Sovereign programs are analyzed as geopolitics narratives; the price-insensitivity floor effect on GPU utilization is missed by chip analysts modeling only hyperscaler capex cycles.

margin.buffer_note: Requires sovereign programs to persist through political cycles — fragile vs. budget pressure or electoral shifts.
margin.breaks_at: Budget cuts >50% across 3+ major sovereign programs, or no commercial deployment milestone by 2028

theses.body: Sovereign AI compute buildouts (Gulf, EU, Southeast Asia) represent price-insensitive demand that floors GPU/fab utilization regardless of US hyperscaler capex cycle.

theses.statement: The AI wrapper / commodity-API window closes by 2027 as model providers capture the margin and distribution commoditizes.
theses.kill_condition: A wrapper-layer company reaches $1B ARR without model-provider margin compression by 2027.
theses.plain: Companies that just put a nice interface on top of someone else's AI model will get squeezed out by 2027 as the model makers themselves move up the stack and capture that value.

kill_watch.signal: Largest pure wrapper-layer company: ARR and gross-margin trend
kill_watch.current_value: unverified — no confirmed $1B ARR wrapper-only company with stable margin as of this vintage
kill_watch.trigger_value: $1B ARR at sustainable/improving margin, no model-provider compression

theses.edge_basis: Everyone sees model providers getting stronger; the timing and finality of the squeeze (by 2027, not 2030) and the distribution commoditization mechanism are still contested.

margin.buffer_note: Model-provider pricing data and distribution metrics make the compression trajectory concrete by mid-2026 milestones.
margin.breaks_at: Wrapper company achieves $1B ARR at sustainable margin without model-provider competition by 2027

theses.body: The AI wrapper / commodity-API window closes by 2027 as model providers capture the margin and distribution commoditizes.
